title: A Jazz HR Automation or Integration
excerpt:

posts.author: emma_marth (Emma Marthaler)
posts.cookedHtml:
Happy Wednesday Monday Users (and Programmers if they see this),

I work in the recruiting space and I’m working on establishing a more efficient system for tracking our retention calls (the excel spreadsheet is kind of an eye sore). While I don’t mind typing in and transferring the date over manually, it would be would be so much more convenient if I were able to sync the data from Jazz into my Monday board.

Jazz does allow you to create your own custom fields so maybe a sync automation could look like this: “When a custom field date is changed in Jazz, sync the date to the coordinating custom Monday Column.” There’s probably a much better way of phrasing that, but some type of programming to sync new hires/updated custom fields to specific coordinating columns on my board would make things easier to track.

Thanks,
Emma

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml: Emma, that can be accmplished with tools like Zapier or Make. DM if that’s of your interest.
